mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_trial_application WHERE deleted = 0 AND (clinic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT id, clinic_name, contact_name, phone, region, scale, remark, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_trial_application WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_trial_application (clinic_name, contact_name, phone, region, scale, remark, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{clinicName}, #{contactName}, #{phone}, #{region}, #{scale}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_trial_application clinic_name = #{clinicName}, contact_name = #{contactName}, phone = #{phone}, region = #{region}, scale = #{scale}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_trial_application SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
